channel.title: IndieGala Game Bundles
channel.description: New game bundles on IndieGala, tracked via barter.vg.

item.title: Pixel Traditions Bundle 3
item.description: IndieGala bundle: Pixel Traditions Bundle 3. Contains 8 games. Available until Fri, 31 Jul 2026 13:07:00 +0000.

item.title: Sensual Clinic Bundle
item.description: IndieGala bundle: Sensual Clinic Bundle. Contains 16 games. Available until Fri, 24 Jul 2026 11:30:00 +0000.

item.title: Summer Blade Bundle
item.description: IndieGala bundle: Summer Blade Bundle. Contains 6 games. Available until Wed, 08 Jul 2026 12:06:00 +0000.

item.title: Twist & Tangle Bundle
item.description: IndieGala bundle: Twist & Tangle Bundle. Contains 9 games. Available until Tue, 28 Jul 2026 10:07:00 +0000.
